marketing used to be the laughing stock of silicon valley

engineers we're at the top of the hierarchy, the most in demand

but it's now the age of ai 

i think marketers will have the last laugh

we're going to all have to figure out distribution

the wealthiest people will be marketers over the next 10 years

Text-to-manga is here ✨

I asked the new Uni-1 from @LumaLabsAI to read my X profile and make a manga about my life.

It wrote a story about me + @omooretweets disagreeing on a pitch - and then constructed character sheets, rendered panels, and checked its work.

The output 👇 https://t.co/JHIupmTRry

tweets.name: Venture Twins
tweets.text:
I cannot wait until an AI agent can just navigate the healthcare system for me. 

It's like a part time job if you've got anything going on - endless phone calls (during business hours!), portal messages, and follow-ups.

I feel like it's beyond time to delegate this 🫠

tweets.name: Balaji Srinivasan
tweets.text:
AI is a shortcut.

So it’s useful.
But it’s lazy.

So it speeds execution.
But it hides complexity.

So you want to use it.
But definitely not overuse it.

So the user of AI often loves it.
But the reader of AI often hates it.
